name: Learning curve chart shows per-iteration runs and banked lessons
description: Below the iteration log, a LEARNING CURVE section shows a bar chart with one stacked column per iteration (green passed runs, red failed runs), a dashed cumulative-lessons line, and a bordered list row per banked lesson.

planSteps.description: Scroll down to the LEARNING CURVE section below the iteration log

Verify the LEARNING CURVE section shows a chart inside a bordered panel with one column of stacked bars per iteration (as many columns as ITERATION LOG entries), iteration numbers along the bottom axis, and a run-count axis on the left

Verify below the chart there is one bordered lesson row per banked lesson, each showing a lesson id (like L1) in green, a one-line rule, and its source iteration; the number of rows equals the 'lessons learned' count in the stats block
